channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla stock has a SpaceX problem, veteran analyst says
item.description: The global investment bankJefferies just added a fresh twist to the Tesla (TSLA) stock debate. According to TheFly, veteran analyst Philippe Houchois kept his cautious stance on Tesla, but his latest take goes beyond deliveries, margins, robotaxis or EV demand. His concern is tied to SpaceX ...

item.title: NatPower and Tesla Strike 25 GWh European Battery Storage Deal
item.description: NatPower and Tesla have signed a multi-year agreement to deploy more than 25 GWh of battery storage across Europe.

item.title: Tesla: The Vision Is Real - The Execution Isn't
Ross Gerber Calls Waymo 'Way Safer And Better' Than Tesla's FSD, Questions Whether Elon Musk Can 'Catch Up'
item.description: Investor Ross Gerber of Gerber Kawasaki has hailed Alphabet Inc.-backed Robotaxi service Waymo ahead of Elon Musk-led Tesla Inc., saying the former is better at navigating Los Angeles traffic. Can Tesla Catch Up? In a post on X on Sunday, Gerber shared that he had been using Waymo recently to com...

item.title: Tesla: The Changing Q2 Narrative (Rating Upgrade)
Peak-Elon Euphoria Makes Tesla A Strong Sell
Tesla Quietly Files Megapod Trademark — An AI Data Center Play That Could See Elon Musk Challenging Nvidia's Dominance
item.description: Tesla Inc. wants to sell modular artificial intelligence data center hardware, according to a new trademark application for a product called "Megapod," which points to the automaker’s next possible AI infrastructure push. Tesla Files Intent To Use Megapod Trademark The filing was first spotted Sa...

item.title: Tesla: An Optimistic Or Unrealistic Forecast May Not Sustain Shares Forever
Is SpaceX a Better Buy Than the 2 "Magnificent Seven" Stocks It Has Surpassed in Market Cap?
item.description: SpaceX's debut as a public company is reshuffling the ranks of the world's most valuable tech stocks.

item.title: TSLA Stock: Tesla Doubles EU Registrations In May But BYD Still Leads With Over 26K Units
item.description: Tesla registered 21,767 new passenger cars last month in the EU, compared to 8,623 units in May 2025, according to data from the European Automobile Manufacturers’ Association (ACEA).

item.title: Micron, Sandisk, SpaceX, Tesla, Carnival, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
item.description: FEATURE Artificial intelligence stocks fell sharply and dragged the down 2.2% amid concerns over leverage in the market, higher interest rates, and megacap hyperscalers’ aggressive spending plans. Alphabet dropped 1%.

item.title: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk Predicts 10X Global Economic Growth By 2036 Barring World War III — But Jim Chanos Isn't Buying It
item.description: Space Exploration Technologies Corp. and Tesla Inc. CEO Elon Musk says the world economy could grow up to 10 times its current size in the next decade, barring a scenario wherein there is another world war.

item.title: SpaceX Stock: Cathie Wood Bought More SPCX As It Dived 16%
item.description: Cathie Wood's firm ARK Invest bought more than 200,000 shares of Elon Musk's SpaceX on Monday when the stock tumbled 16%.

item.title: Why Tesla Stock Dropped on Tuesday
item.description: UBS raises deliveries estimates for Tesla -- and thinks the stock will fall 10%.

item.title: Tesla pushes back against unfair reporting of accidents
item.description: Tesla is pushing back against the unfair reporting of accidents involving its vehicles. Many media outlets were quick to jump to conclusions about a fatal accident involving a Tesla in Katy, Texas, that happened recently. The driver of the vehicle, which slammed into a brick house and killed a wo...

item.title: Tesla stock tumbles amid new probe over fatal crash into Texas home
item.description: Automotive execs tout automated driver assistance systems like Ford BlueCruise, General Motors Super Cruise, and Tesla Full Self-Driving (Supervised) as the ultimate key to unlocking safer roads. There were more than 40,000 motor vehicle-related deaths in 2023, according to the Insurance Institut...

item.title: Tesla Europe Registrations Jump 57% As Recovery Gains Momentum
item.description: Tesla registrations more than doubled in May, supported by strong growth in Germany and the UK.

item.title: TSLA Stock Falls 6% As Q2 Delivery Optimism Collides With FSD Safety Probe
item.description: Wall Street analysts are raising their estimates for the second quarter, pointing to improving sales trends in key markets while noting Tesla’s strategic pivot away from traditional vehicle production.

item.title: Tesla Stock’s Good News on Sales Overwhelmed by the Bad
item.description: Tesla stock slipped as the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration said it would examine a fatal crash.

item.title: SPCX: Should you Buy the Dip?
item.description: Think SpaceX is just a rocket company? Think again. SPCX has evolved to dominate global telecom, AI infrastructure, and the modern space economy.

item.title: Tesla gets another layer of gamification with Free Supercharging on the line
item.description: Tesla Supercharging is getting yet another layer of gamification, as the company is rolling out a new competition that could win Free Supercharging miles. Tesla is ramping up its efforts to make vehicle ownership more engaging through gamification. In June 2026, the company announced the 2026 Fre...

item.title: Tesla pushes back as fatal Texas crash reignites self-driving scrutiny
item.description: Tesla disputed claims that its driver-assistance software caused a fatal crash in Texas after a Model 3 left the road, plowed through a brick house at high speed, and killed a woman inside.

item.title: Tesla faces federal probe into fatal crash: What it means for Robotaxi & full self-driving
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) is facing a federal investigation into a fatal car crash in Texas, in which the driver claimed that Tesla's full self-driving (FSD) was engaged. Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian chats with Yahoo Finance's Julie Hyman about what we know so far.

item.title: Tesla Locks In a Major European Megapack Deal With NatPower
item.description: The multiyear agreement covers 25 GWh of battery storage across Italy and Britain

item.title: Tesla Stunning Europe Rebound Sparks Fresh EV Battle With BYD
item.description: BYD Overtakes Expectations as Tesla Roars Back in Europe's Growing EV Market

item.title: Tesla Faces New Crash Probe
item.description: U.S. safety regulators are reviewing a fatal Model 3 crash in Texas.

item.title: Tesla and BYD Gain Ground in Europe
item.description: Electric vehicles continue taking market share.

item.title: Tesla tops American-Made Index for sixth-consecutive year
item.description: Tesla is atop the American-Made Index from Cars.com for the sixth-straight year, as the Model 3 and Model Y took the top two spots, respectively. Last year, the Model 3, Model Y, Model S, and Model X took the top four spots, respectively. The company has routinely performed well in the Index .

item.title: Tesla admits FSD was on in fatal Texas crash, blames driver for ‘overriding’ it
item.description: Tesla now confirms that its self-driving system was engaged when a Model 3 left a residential road in Katy, Texas, and killed a 76-year-old woman inside her home — but the company says the driver overrode it by pressing the accelerator to 100%. Everything points to a pedal misapplication while th...

item.title: Tesla, NatPower strike $5B deal for 25 GWh of Megapack storage
item.description: Tesla and independent energy firm NatPower have reached a deal to build 25 gigawatt-hours of battery storage in Italy and Britain, the first phase of a program worth up to $5 billion. Under the multiyear agreement, NatPower will deploy Tesla’s Megapack systems and use Tesla’s trading software to ...

item.title: This Ex-Rental Tesla's Battery Was Heavily Degraded. Then The Decline Slowed
item.description: After losing 20% of its capacity in its first two years, this abused Tesla’s battery degradation appears to have almost plateaued.

item.title: Tesla Bull Case ‘Unraveling in Real Time’? Analyst Says SpaceX Tie-Up Could Leave Trillions Of FSD, Optimus Value ‘On the Table’
item.description: GLJ Research analyst Gordon Johnson said that a Tesla-SpaceX deal would undercut one of the core pillars of the Tesla bull case.

item.title: NatPower and Tesla Launch First Stage of Multi-Billion-Dollar Energy Storage Initiative
item.description: Expansion Targets 25 GWh of Battery CapacityIndependent energy developer NatPower and Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) have entered into an agreement to deploy 25 gigawatt hours of battery storage capacity across Italy and the United Kingdom, marking the opening phase of a broader programme that could be wort...

item.title: Tesla Auto Registrations in Europe Gain in May, Other Makers Mixed
item.description: EV-maker Tesla (TSLA) new automobile registrations in Europe rose to 28,610 in May, up 107.9% on yea

item.title: Nasdaq, S&P 500, Dow Futures Crack On Tech, SpaceX Selloff: Why SPCX, TSLA, INFQ, MU, HOOD, ADTX Are In Focus
item.description: Stocktwits data showed retail sentiment has turned cautious, sinking to ‘bearish’ on SPY and ‘neutral’ on QQQ.

item.title: Tesla headed for its biggest fight in Europe yet
item.description: Tesla's recovery in Europe has been remarkable. Europe, the world's second-largest EV market behind China, seemed done with the company in 2025. Tesla (TSLA) lost market share in European countries where it had previously been popular as the influx of cheaper Chinese models and CEO Elon Musk's ...

item.title: Tesla Stock Heads For Red June — Jefferies Warns It Could Become a SpaceX Proxy As Merger Talk Builds
item.description: The brokerage added that launches of robotaxis and humanoid robots may initially become “loss centers.”

item.title: Is a Tesla-SpaceX Merger Imminent?
item.description: Stay focused on more important catalysts for either stock.

item.title: GM leans into AI to rewrite rules on vehicle design
item.description: Last month, during the company’s earnings call, GM CEO Mary Barra updated the world on the company’s autonomous driving ambitions. General Motors is working on eyes-off, hands-off self-driving technology that will launch in 2028 on the Cadillac Escalade IQ. Such a breakthrough would put it ahead ...

item.title: A Little Good News for Tesla's Big Forgotten Product
item.description: Tesla's Semi is generating serious interest, backed by impressive results -- and potential customers are taking notice.

item.title: Global EV Industry Faces Outsized Risk From Cobalt Supply Disruptions
item.description: Nearly half of EVs still rely on cobalt-based batteries, leaving automakers exposed to supply chain risks despite the growing adoption of cobalt-free LFP batteries by companies like Tesla and BYD.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Ascends While Market Falls: Some Facts to Note
item.description: In the closing of the recent trading day, Tesla (TSLA) stood at $405.05, denoting a +1.14% move from the preceding trading day.

item.title: Tesla finally clarifies fatal Texas crash, confirms driver manually overrode acceleration
item.description: Tesla has finally clarified the situation regarding the viral crash in Texas where a Model 3 slammed into a home. CEO Elon Musk replied to reports on Monday that stated the crash was due to the company’s Full Self-Driving or Autopilot suite, which seemed unlikely to those who are familiar with it...

item.title: Ashok: "@elonmusk @kylaschwaberow Yup. In this case, the driver manually overrode self-driving by pressing the accelerator all the way to 100% of the accel pedal in this residential area. They reached a speed of 73 mph during the crash, and had the accelerator pressed even after the crash."
item.description: submitted by /u/komocode_ [link] [comments]

item.title: Buying SpaceX Stock Isn't the Same as Buying Tesla's IPO Back in 2010. There's One Massive Difference
item.description: SpaceX isn't likely to generate the mammoth returns that Tesla has since going public.

item.title: NHTSA probes fatal Tesla crash into Texas home that killed woman
item.description: Federal safety regulators are now investigating the fatal Tesla crash in Katy, Texas, where a Model 3 left a residential road, tore through a brick home, and killed a 76-year-old woman inside. The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration said Monday it is examining the June 20 crash, after ...

item.title: SpaceX makes $20 billion move to optimize its balance sheet
item.description: SpaceX announced today that it commenced its first-ever public bond offering, marking a significant step in the newly public company’s capital markets strategy. The company announced an offering of senior unsecured notes expected to raise at least $20 billion. The move comes just a short time aft...

item.title: Tesla On Autopilot Crashes Into Texas House, Killing One
item.description: On Friday, June 19, 2026, a Tesla Model Y driven by Michael Butler left the road and crashed into a home in Katy, Texas. A 76-year-old woman in the living room was struck by the car. She was airlifted to a hospital and was later pronounced dead.

item.title: SpaceX confirms third massive compute deal at Colossus data center
item.description: SpaceX confirmed today that it has officially signed its third massive compute deal, providing compute at its Colossus data center in Southaven, Tennessee. Reflection AI will gain immediate access to NVIDIA GB300 chips at SpaceX’s Colossus 2 data center. In return, Reflection will pay SpaceX $150...

item.title: The SpaceX IPO Is Over. History Says Investors Should Do This Next.
item.description: SpaceX now has a market cap well above $2 trillion.
